texto: We live individual lives with the consciousness of death and awareness of the past. But the most important part of that sentence is the individual part. Let yourself be humbled by the experiences people have been having for thousands of years. And speak of it.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Winter sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “We live individual lives with the consciousness of death and awareness of the past.
